summary: Back4app exposes a Parse REST API at `https://parseapi.back4app.com` authenticated with `X-Parse-Application-Id` + `X-Parse-REST-API-Key`, a Parse GraphQL API at `https://parseapi.back4app.com/graphql` authenticated with `X-Parse-Application-Id` + `X-Parse-Client-Key` (optionally plus `X-Parse-Session-Token` for logged-in user context), and a stdio MCP server run via `npx @back4app/mcp-server-back4app` authenticated with a Back4app account key/personal access token.
